content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-025)

## CRITICAL — SNAP build is RED (regression)
`AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` does NOT cold-build (~25 errors from a partial
Option-A re-base). FIRST ACTION next iter, before anything else:
1. **Restore green.** No git recovery (single untracked commit). The iter-024 green split-consumer was
   overwritten with no backup. Only green fallback = `SectionGradedRing.lean.presplit-backup` (216852 B,
   iter-021-green MONOLITH; reverting loses the file split but `SectionGradedRingLocalized.lean` —
   72990 B, sorry-free, untouched — can stay or be re-merged). Confirm the restored file cold-builds the
   CONSUMER (not just the extracted module) before proceeding.
2. **DO NOT re-attempt a monolithic Option-A refactor.** It has failed 4 consecutive iters
   (iter-022 timeout, 023 false-green-via-private, 024 build-fix-only, 025 broke-build). pc025's
   conditional abort-and-escalate flag FIRED. Either:
   - (a) decompose Option-A into per-def cold-build-gated MICRO-refactors — ONE def re-based per lane,
     mandatory CONSUMER cold-build after EACH, revert-on-red — never a multi-def batch; OR
   - (b) escalate to the user (see TO_USER.md): the refactor mechanism is exhausted; the user can
     confirm the design, relax the frozen `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native` signature, or supply a worked
     re-base of one def as a template.
3. Process root cause (recurring): refactor lanes keep timing out and committing half-migrated files.
   Any future SNAP refactor MUST be scoped small enough to finish within budget AND must back up the
   current green file first (the loop has no git safety net here).

## HIGH — FBC: dedicate a `prove` lane to `ring_square_cocycle` (NOT fine-grained)
The 2 missing Iso-level primitives are now landed; all Mathlib mate API verified real; blueprint chapter
gate is CLEARED (br025: complete+correct, no must-fix). The remaining work is ONE large structural lemma.
- Directive: author the abstract `ring_square_cocycle` statement to MIRROR the glue's 6-iso telescope
  (explicit functor + iso + adjunction params so the closing `exact` is structural). Prove via
  `conjugateIsoEquiv_symm_comp` (new) + `iterated_mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv` recognition +
  `mateEquiv_vcomp`/`_hcomp` pasting, closing on `gammaPushforwardNatIso_comp`. Optionally use
  `CatCommSq.hComp` for the pasting (analogist `analogies/fbc-glue-carrier-whnf.md`).
- **Decisive route test (must run):** after wiring `exact ring_square_cocycle …` into the glue, COLD
  `lake build` the file — LSP/`lean_run_code` hide the kernel timeout. If the `exact` unifies kernel-light,
  the glue + crux `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural` close transitively. If the cocycle's 4
  hyps fail to discharge cleanly OR the `exact` whnf-bombs, that is a genuine STUCK at the abstract level
  → escalate (do NOT loop on the same statement).
- Delete the now-unused concrete `ring_square_glue_natTrans` scaffolding (over-budget artifact) once the
  cocycle lands.

## MEDIUM — cleanup (lean-auditor iter025)
- FBC: 5 `set_option maxHeartbeats` @L2328, L2363–2366 are on `/-! … -/` doc-comment headers (no-op);
  the theorems they were meant to guard are UNcovered. In the COMPILE-DEAD `base_change_mate_*`
  apparatus → fold into the long-deferred excision lane (sync blueprint `\uses` when excising; recurring
  flag since iter-022). Do NOT excise with an FBC prover.
- SNAP: dead "Retained reference" comment block @L1380–1438 falsely claims to be used by the half-lemma
  proofs — remove during the SNAP green-restore.

## MEDIUM — blueprint coverage debt (lvbc fbc025 + dag unmatched)
- `archon dag-query unmatched`: 84 `lean_aux` nodes (was 82 iter-024). The +2 NEW this iter:
  `AlgebraicGeometry.conjugateIsoEquiv_comp` and `AlgebraicGeometry.conjugateIsoEquiv_symm_comp` (both
  in `Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean`, both sorry-free Iso-level mate-composition laws, deps: Mathlib
  `conjugateEquiv_comp`/`conjugateEquiv_symm_comp` + `conjugateIsoEquiv_apply_hom`). Add Mathlib-gap
  blueprint anchors for these in `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` so the DAG sees them. Remaining ~82 are
  pre-existing (≈67 SNAP `Modules.*`, ~15 FBC helpers) — no NEW SNAP debt this iter.

## Do NOT re-assign
- FBC carrier-bearing glue (`ring_square_glue_natTrans` / any `tilde`/`pullback (Spec _)`-naming
  statement): genuine STUCK at the kernel (iter-020–024). The abstract cocycle is the only live route.
- SNAP monolithic Option-A refactor: 4-iter failed mechanism (see CRITICAL above).
